# Connectivity Analysis

::: reaxkit.analysis.connectivity.connectivity
    options:
      show_root_heading: false
      show_root_full_path: false
      members: []

## Request: `ConnectionListRequest`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Request for extracting frame-resolved bond connections.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `frames` | `Optional[Sequence[int]]` |  | Optional frame indices to include. Example: [0, 10, 20]. |  |
| `every` | `int` | 1 | Stride for selected frames. Example: every=5. |  |
| `min_bo` | `float` | 0.0 | Minimum bond-order threshold for connection inclusion. Example: 0.3. |  |
| `undirected` | `bool` | True | Merge i-j and j-i into one edge when true. | True, False |
| `include_self` | `bool` | False | Include self-edges (src == dst) when true. | True, False |

### Examples

```python
req = ConnectionListRequest(frames=[0, 10, 20], min_bo=0.3, undirected=True)
```
Sample output:
`ConnectionListRequest(...)`
Meaning:
The request configures frame sampling and edge-threshold extraction rules.

</div>

## Task: `ConnectionListTask`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

### Method: `recommended_presentations(_result: ConnectionListResult, payload: dict[str, Any])`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Build default table/plot presentations for connection-list outputs.

#### Works on

Analyzer task output payloads

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `_result` | `ConnectionListResult` | Analysis result object for the executed task. |
| `payload` | `dict[str, Any]` | Serialized result payload used by presentation dispatch. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `list[PresentationSpec]` | Recommended renderer specs for table and BO trend plot. |

#### Examples

```text
```python
specs = ConnectionListTask.recommended_presentations(result, payload)
```
Sample output:
Table view plus `BO vs frame_idx` plot view.
Meaning:
Connection-list outputs can be rendered with default mappings.
```


</div>

### Method: `run(data: ConnectivityData, request: ConnectionListRequest, reporter=None)`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Extract frame-resolved connectivity edges from bond-order matrices.

#### Works on

`ConnectivityData` plus `ConnectionListRequest` analyzer inputs

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data` | `ConnectivityData` | Connectivity series containing bond-order matrices and metadata. |
| `request` | `ConnectionListRequest` | Selection and threshold configuration for edge extraction. |
| `reporter` | `Any, optional` | Optional progress callback invoked during frame processing. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `ConnectionListResult` | Edge table with one row per qualifying bond occurrence. |

#### Examples

```text
```python
result = ConnectionListTask().run(data, ConnectionListRequest(min_bo=0.2))
```
Sample output:
`result.table` with columns including `source`, `destination`, and `BO`.
Meaning:
Qualifying bond-order edges are emitted per selected frame.
```


</div>

</div>

## Result: `ConnectionListResult`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Connection-list extraction result.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `table` | `pd.DataFrame` |  |  |  |
| `request` | `ConnectionListRequest` |  |  |  |

### Examples

```python
result = ConnectionListTask().run(data, req)
result.table.head()
```
Sample output:
DataFrame rows for each selected edge occurrence.
Meaning:
Each row is one bond edge record at one frame.

</div>
